data.body: S2c (1ccf) DONE via held-out TDD: has_fresh_verified/all_members_fresh_verified + await_fresh_verified (bounded, hand-back on timeout) + ancestor_atomic_submit (single tip submit, partial-land PartialLandError, per-member ticket close). 8 tests, full suite 29/29 GREEN, teeth verified. Pushed #585. FULL S2 loop stacked: #582(S1)->#583(S2a)->#584(S2b)->#585(S2c). Next: check CI votes, then S3/S4/S5/S6.
